name: Midnight Munchers
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Unsweetened baking chocolate (melted and cooled)
1 can Caramel pecan frosting (ready to spread)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Chocolate Lovers II, Pillsbury
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9 inch pan. In a large bowl, cream together brown sugar and butter until well combined. Blend in vanilla extract and eggs; mix until just incorporated. Sift flour into measuring cup; level off. Stir flour, baking powder, and salt into the mixture; combine until smooth. Divide dough into two parts; stir chocolate into half of the dough. Drop spoonfuls of the dough randomly onto prepared pan, spreading evenly with a spatula. Bake at 350°F for 17 to 22 minutes or until golden brown. Allow to cool completely. Spread frosting over bars. Freeze bars for about 30 minutes. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and butter; bring to boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; stir in chocolate chips until melted and smooth. Pour topping over bars. Refrigerate for 30 minutes before cutting into bars. Yield: 24 bars.
